actions.name: Leopard Mode
actions.description: Effect: The user is able to change back and forth between Leopard Mode and it's normal state as a Simple Action, costing 5PP each time.

system.description: Effect: The user is able to change back and forth between Leopard Mode and it's normal state as a Simple Action, costing 5PP each time. Whilst in Leopard Mode, the user gains @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-moves.c8e1Irb9Jal4wWCi]{Vulcan Crusher} as a Connected Move.
